name: hitch-face
description: Desktop widget displaying animated robot face expressions matching Hitch events

scripts.build: npm run build:adapter && npm run build:native
scripts.build:native: cd native && zig build frontend-build && zig build
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:adapter && cd native && zig build package -Dpackage-target=macos -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:adapter && cd native && zig build package -Dpackage-target=windows -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:adapter && cd native && zig build package -Dpackage-target=linux -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall
scripts.test: npm run build:adapter && node tests/extract-metadata.test.js && node tests/adapter.test.js && node tests/install-extension.test.js
